headline: Risk-on screaming: space/satellite cluster +15-25%; CMCSA spin catalyst rippling to DIS, WBD; SCOTUS M&A unlock.

actions.line: Half-size long; bullish signal, clean $0.20 stop vs $0.40 target — late-entry risk flagged by desk.

changed: Desk takes down to 2 from 4 — previous live picks cleared.
